queries.question: What functions do all health apps have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Functions.value  from Health_Apps_Functions join Functions on Health_Apps_Functions.functionID = Functions.functionID join Health_Apps on Health_Apps_Functions.healthAppID = Health_Apps.appID   GROUP BY Health_Apps_Functions.functionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Health_Apps_Functions.healthAppID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Health_Apps)

queries.question: Show me the functions of each health app.
queries.sql: select health_apps.name , functions.value from Health_Apps_Functions join Functions on Health_Apps_Functions.functionID = Functions.functionID join Health_Apps on Health_Apps_Functions.healthAppID = Health_Apps.appID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?value WHERE {
  ?health_apps_functions a :Health_Apps_Functions .
  ?functions a :Functions .
  ?health_apps_functions p:hasFunctions ?functions .
  ?health_apps a :Health_Apps .
  ?health_apps_functions p:hasHealth_Apps ?health_apps .
  ?health_apps p:name ?name .
  ?functions p:value ?value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the functions of each health app.
